titleStmt.title: SII 35.35: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 35. (A.R. No. 27 of 1950-51.) BOMBAY, BOMBAY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Prince of Wales Museum Slab No. HB. 7.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 36, Khara, Vaiśākha Puṇṇami, Monday, Vyatīpāta, lunar eclipse. The details of date equate with 1111 A.D., April 25.

It records the construction of a temple at Eleyapūruvadavaḷḷi by Māchiyakka, wife of Mahāsāmantādhipati Daṇḍanāyaka Muṭṭigalla-Chaṭṭōpādhyāya. States that the village was being governed by Malayamatīdēvi who is described as the piriyarasi of the king. Reviewed in ASR for 1936-37, p. 99.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] jayatyāviṣkṟitaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāha kṣōbhitārṇṇavaṁ
© dakṣiṇōṁnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . namassavitrē jagadēkacakṣuśē jagatprasūti sthitināśa hētavē [.] trayī mayāya
© ṇāṁta rāśiṇē viriṁcinārāyaṇaśaṁkarātmanē . śrībhuvanamaśēṣamaṁ vīra vṛtti yaṁ nijabhujapratāpadināḷuttaviralke
himadināsētuvaraṁ cāḷukyavikramādityanṛpaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
© rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōtta rābhivriddhipravarddhamānamā
candrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . tatupūjyar . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . vidvajjana
hṛdayānandapradāyakanubhayamīmāṁsaratnākara ṣa kamaḷinīdivākaraṁ kāvyakēḷī sa rada rājahaṁsa cāṇakyamatamāṇikyāvataṁsa cā
ḷukyacakrēśvaraviśvāsaniḷayaṁ śivaprasādalabdhakīrttivyāptibhūvaḷayaṁ . saṁgīta cāturī caturānanaṁ . prativādivāraṇakēḷīpaṁcānanaṁ nāmādi samasta
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvasaṁpūjyarappa śrīmanmahāpradhāna piriyagrāharaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ muṭṭigallacaṭṭōpādhyāyar . © .
tribhuvanamalladēvaparipūjitaruddhayaśōvirājitar . śubhagakavīndra nditaraninitarunnatamāna mandara kavi bhavyapurandaraṁ manumunīndrasaṁmānayā
nadānakabhyabhinavakuḷaprasūtaratipūtarasā ninna mūrtigaḷalatrimunīśvara pavitrar sucaritraranyacāraputrar pātrīkṛtōdhyadamaḷinagōtra sutasa
mastadēvavidhātrar . Ene negaḻda vipravaṁśābdhinī vi navaṁśadavatāramanā yyasikṣata venintappa sayvanāvaṁ paḍeva karahaḍanālchāsirakaṁ śiramenisi
da grahāramukhatiḷakaṁ bittaripaḍe koggaṭanūrina dora niyamagrahāra mā ve . Alliya pra tama llanuta sakaḷaśāstravēdavidaccāsvallakṣmībhā jana
mellasadha rbbhita catu ḷāḍhyār . Avaroḷage sakaḷaśāstrapravīṇa vidana pitabhaṭṭa trivikramanūrjjita trivikramanesada . Ā satya
vratana sarasvatigarundhatige migila susamaya sida nāgi jagakutsava riyase ppuda janaka
mudamuyise janakke kīrttimu ra negaḻdu
du muṭṭigallayya caṭṭadaṇḍādhipa riyaṁgiḍisutīśa trisamu panemalla śvara caṭṭadaṇḍēśvarananaḷaṁkarisi māciyakka negaḻdaḷ . ta dvige vadhu sadṛśa
śadvara nivahage nīsa jagadvarare śvakratārtharivargge samā
phaḷakēṁdra dhāriṇi satata pariya yaśatriga balada brata guṇadoḷu bhāvipoṁdaggaḷameṁdolave vogaḻda ta tyavratā
guṇadoḻdaṁ paḍeva siri ba ḷanisi mā ka li sida sirige nāga vanija vārddhiyoḷ janayisidaḷ . vimaḷapari
triya raṇa ntenalla ramage vibhūpāvavolatiśaya śi bhā ha sippa vesava palasige dēśaṁ beḷadaḻigida kaḷa yakeyga dinavanatapa kvajāḷige
nucitavanāvaḷigaḷinaḷigaḷiṁpe gadina sa dēśavesevudu mātu jagavāḍeleya parvidavari ma rudyānanikāmaṁ vṛtā
digvikāṁtaṭakārāma bhuvanamaṇḍaḷavidita nānāviśēṣadiśākalpaka ppadaḻa menipudu nōrppa janada kaṇgamanaka . baḷasidanandanāvaḷigaḷiṁ baḷe
doppuva keyvolaṁgaḷiṁ lalitalatāgraha rinudhyadaśēṣa viśēṣasalkaḷākaḷita kada vagrahagaḷē maṁ goḷisuvudagrahāramukhamaṇḍanama da śōbhe
lada nāḷkaḷadruma kha pakamāḷe tenaka miśvarasē kaṇge tānedalenisirppaḷ . Abhinava rarasasvabhāvasau
ndaryadiṁ kaḷāpariṇa bhū vanamalla mahi caṁge malayāma varata paramakalyāṇābhyudayabhōginī dvitīyalakṣmīsa
mānakaḷahaṁsayende Anavarata vitaraṇa nānāthava midappa rāmarājyābhyudayaśōbhanānēkaśubhalakṣaṇalakṣmītāṁgi
rāya sarbbajñanarddāṁgimṛdumadhuravacanaracanacaturakaḷāḷāpe gōtraratnapradīpe śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsiniyarappa śrīmadabhinavasarasvatiśrīmatpiriyara
si paṭṭamādēvi malayamatidēviyar śrīmanmahāgrahāravalayapūrvvadavaḷḷiyaṁ tribhōgābhyantara siddhiyiṁ su dina nāyata pūrvva ḷēhagra
gadē ḷatakaṁcakra rū pā nēkaśāstra pāragarakhiḷa vida nimmaḷina kīrttigaḷaliyalli nantatavinū niva
tātta gāṁbhīrya ntaṁtese viku vi kaḷā ḷā yutarinnū ssu yāpaśrūta
pāṁdhara viśru pama nassa satyāśraya tivisi ya rpar . Avaroḷ . śēṣagōtra śrī bāsitakīrttisāraya dhikōtsavaru
kānnaḷānadiravani ṇiyemā peṁpa yyanā sośaiya śrīyaracārya caritra dūra mi vaṇṇisa
hanenipo ppanedoṁdavaryya ke te paribhāvipoḍargge jagadhvanita ja nitatva ma
yoḷ . candramatidēvi hariścandramahipatiyā benana ye vana mita patigaḷa sukhya ya
jjaḍaṁ bhuvanajanāhade janimi gataviśāpa vibhu nācimayya jana ma vaṁsa vaṇa puṇyavati guṇavati rakṣisatigavakavanipa sama
Avargge janiyisidaṁ kā yadina nujanuddharisi dharmma nātana tamma . guṇanidhi vibhu sagaṇa tai
ṇa bṛdhaṁ mahā nidāpraṇutariva dāttargge varūpanepa rā va vārava
māramaṇijaniyo ca taṟadirame mābaladēvi ja niyiba Arivina kaṇi dharma lavi sadācāradāgaraṁ māntanadode caṭṭena ga
matanagaṟagisade māciyakkanabaḷāratnaṁ . Āva si dēvigaha śrīmuṭṭigallacaṭṭadaṇḍādhīśaṁ tāmādarapa rvvasu marasaṁstutyaranvayāni
nītasatyaru . kṛta vamātidanavanītaḷakenakannadānadiṁ taṇiyarcciyāpati sōma yōjanāyōnna tanagrajaneseva mallikārjunabhaṭṭaṁ . tadanu
janakhiḷakaḷākōvidanudyad vēdaśāstravidanesedanidō vidhi sarvvēśvara caṭṭadaṁṇḍanāyaka nudātta kīrttipatākaṁ . Āpūrvva vaḍetana jaṁ śrīpatnīpati
samasta vidyāpati vākśrīpati nirmmaḷina yaśaśrīpati nāciyaṇacaṭṭaḍaṇḍādhīśaṁ . pati muṭṭa camūpati tatsutaṁ mūcamahānubhāvanenal
tatsatinoṁnnanoṁbeyaṁṇana tanū vaḷeḷeyoḷinnu munna Ā māciyakkanadhipa śrīmuṭṭaṁgalla caṭṭadaṁḍēśvaranuṁ tāvirvvarumāḷōcisi
kāmitamaṁ tandarandu dharmada deseyoḷ . Endu manadandādaḍaṁ caṁdalayavana māḍipa vorandiṁgaṁ kēḍilladudoṁdidaṁ dhārmika janaṁgaḷoḷ voroḷ .
Endavarirvvaruṁ svajanabaṁdhujanayandu niṁdandanurāgadiṁdaleyaporvadavaḷḷi mahāgrahāravā ndāvatīva yōgyarati dhārmikaralliya viprara
ru diṭadiṁ vicāripaḍe nammadu nammavarella validarvalidapiṁ dharmmamanalli vaṁdyavenutaṁ śrīmāciyakkaṁ guṇāspade tatvāmiyanugrahaṁ baḍedu lō
kōtkaṣṭamappaṁte māḍidaḷatyūrjitadharmmamaṁ harihararārkkāvāsamaṁ bhāratīsudati sadmamananna śāleyaniḷādēvālayavrātamaṁ Ivu vo
lāgi Ā bhairavaniḷayaṁ berasuta trikūṭamanadanādivijādhīśana besadinde śvakarmmavinirmmisida neṁbinagaṁ . lōkāścaryyaṁ tānenalā kōmaḷe kamaḷa
nayane māḍisidaḷadaṁ nākīśanōḍiya mahīlōkādhipanayde pogāḻdumeṁ nā pake . Antā dharmamavēnilanaṁ taraṇīndūgaḷu vuḷḷinaṁ śāśvataveṁ
bantāgire māḍisi tadanantaradoḷ tatrimūrtigaḷgaṁ dvijargge . cāḷukyavikramāṁkanakāḷaṁ ṣaḍtriṁśadabdamene kharavarṣa kāḷaṁbina menipoḷpaṁ pāḷipu vai
śākhamāsadoḷpuṇṇameyoḷ . Amṛtāṁśuvāradoḷ nirupama vyatipātadoḷ mahōtsavadindaṁ samūrjita sōmagrahaṇaṁ samanise tadagaṇya
puṇyapāvanadinadoḷ . svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānaparāyaṇarvvidita vēdavidyāpāragar . ṣaṭkarmmadharmamārgga
niratar . saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṟitāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtōttamāṁgar dvātriṁśat sahasrasamayā gragaṇyarahitavidvaṁsakarāśritajanakaḷpa
vṛkṣar śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjarar . śrīmūrtinārāyaṇadēvalabdhavaraprasādāsāditā mahāmahīśvararappa śrīmanmahāgrahāra vaitiya
pūrvvadavaḷḷiyūroḍeya pramukhavaśēṣamahājanavirnnūrvvaruṁ mūvadiṁbarggā vuṇḍugaḷuṁ bhuvanāga ṇagiyara sabhāmaṁṭapadalaśēṣaṁ nere
diddalli karuvara nāgavarmmagāvuṇḍanuṁ nārggāvuṇḍugeyya ba naṁ sōvagāvuṇḍaṁga mātana maga boppagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ rakkasana magaṁ cikkagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ . basa
ntayana magaṁ hācagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ krayamaṁkoṭṭu sabyāgasahitaṁ biṭṭa hosikālkarcci si koṇḍa bhūmige śrīmadinnūvarggamakṣōṇiyaṁ koṭṭu sarvva
namaśyaṁ māḍi biṭṭa kramaventeṁdaḍe śrī muṭṭēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ veṇṇeyasabbana keṟeyiṁ keḷagaṇa gardde tōṁṭa harvvagōlamattaraydu . mattamādēva
rgge kaiyyabaḷiya naḍupaṭṭigēriyoḷagaṇa padināṟu kaiyagalada hattoṁbhattu kaiyya nīḷada maneyondu . © Ā dēvara pūjārigaḷirvvara jīvita
kkaṁ muttaḷatiya mūraḍiyiṁ modal . hāḷahasugeya baḍagaṇasīme carasana śatadoḷahokka keni Alliṁ teṁka gaṁgarasa śata . Alliṁ teṁka
Udyāreya śata Alliṁ teṁka vonaśatadoḷ pokka kuni . Aṁteraḍu śatadagaladoḷaveraḍuṁ śatadoḷapokka kuniyoḷakūḍi pokka kisu hārvagōla mattaru hattu . ©
mattamādēvara brahmapuriya brāhmaṇaru hannirvvarggaṁ maiyyaloṁdu maneyaṁ koṭṭu mattamavargge bhūmidānava mayya Aydu mattara lekkade koṭṭa
koṁḍaṁgeyi baḍagaṇasīme cāvarasana śatadoḷapokka kuni Alli teṁka gaṁgarasana śata Alliṁ teṁka Uddāra ta Alliṁ teṁkamānaśata . Alliṁ teṁka sōmayāji śatadoḷavoṁ
kka kuni Antu mūruśatadagaladaḷaveraḍu śatadoḷapokku kuneyoḷa ḍi pokku mattaraṟuvattu hiriyakkara . Avargge koṭṭa kaṁmmanege māḍida guṇa śā
sanavanenalā vṛttiyaṁtavargge svādhīnaveṁdu ravumāralā bhā gitarggilla . piriyappana Ā vidya vi vṛtti . ka nippaguṇa jēṣṭavṛttisanava
ne vidvāṁsanappavaṁ mi kanu kiṟuviriyuvana radalli . Avara santānadoḷ yōgyarappavarārumilladoḍaṁ mattaṁ yōgyarappavayārayvuvṛttiyoḷ .
ttippa dhāpari kaṁ rāsvāna vi gaḷanā daliya samaṁtumīkramavu mana naṁ
pratipāḷisuvar . Antu dēvaraṁgabhōgaṁkkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ dōdi nikaraṁ gadde tōṭa haṁ ko ḍige samētaṁ mūḻvarā
lamaḷaveyda mattareppattaydu harvigolada sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ sarvanamaśyaṁ māḍi biṭṭar roḍeyapramu
kharssakaḷārādhyarene nikhiḷa kaḷārājitarucitadharmmamārggānu dharma nidēsarvvimaḷa
parihāradāraṁ sarvasamaśyaṁ naramānaddharadhar . Innūrvvar bhūmige teṟe yaṁ ra kuḷiya suṁka taṁmma mannaṇe bhu
ḷgāḍavaṇavaḷivannayamarasthā pānuṁgal grāmānyantakadiṁ hunāmado pesariṭṭuko kyaḷavanitaṁ tāmāgadantu vipula Ā mara
tatu dharmaḷa svadharmmavanā [pa .] mattamā mahāsati mahānubhāvi mācaladēvi Ūroḍeya pramukhavaśēṣamahājanavinnūvvargge rakṣaṇeya
koṭṭa dēveraḍu baṁdikaṁ . yahinevaḍeda vāraduṁ khaṁḍikavaṇanālva khaṁḍika kavūra pārikhāysadalirvvatu nālku gadyāṇa ponnaninnūrvvadṛvā
khaṁḍikarupādhyāyargge kṣiṇeyavasaṁprati koṭṭu tāvvayoḍematāgina ppuvāgirvviṭṭar . daṁṟiṁdi dharmmannūrvaradavargge dātāra
rā bhūviditavabhūbhūta venunutaṇasedudiḷā dāna naśa naṁdideṟe mahā
kya vinnūrvvara bāmē vibhāśippane tsabha .
tyagemāppa bhaktiyaniḷātyā kaṁ do sarmi
Digital edition of SII 35.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
